mentions.note: Phil caller: very hard to own with warranty problems and war impact; rates not going lower which was only thing Ford needed; pass on this.
On parabolic move after EV-for-data-centers announcement; caller Maria correctly trimmed 20% on rally; Cramer affirms strategy—trim winners to lock gains.

Ford Energy battery storage subsidiary transforms EV losses into 20+ GW annual capacity data center power supply by late 2027; first positive recommendation in years now justified by lower oil/rate environment; trades 8x earnings, 4.3% dividend.
